task_completion.description: Log into the Bahmni system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, clinical app, or registration dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Search for and select the target patient, Robert Anderson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, clinical dashboard, or registration page for 'Robert Anderson' is open. (Note: The system ID may display as BAH000016).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the clinical observation or vitals entry form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry form or consultation tab for recording clinical observations or vitals is open and active.

task_completion.description: Set the observation date to exactly 10 days in the past.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field for the encounter or observation is explicitly modified to a date 10 days prior to the current system date, rather than showing today's date.

task_completion.description: Enter the target weight of 82 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '82' is entered into the Weight (kg) input field.
A success notification appears, or the patient's clinical history/dashboard updates to display the 82 kg weight recorded on the retrospective date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the Bahmni web interface in a browser, not using terminal commands, curl, or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the genuine Bahmni EMR system fields, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the observation is recorded for the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen clearly shows 'Robert Anderson' as the active patient while the weight and date are being entered and saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Robert Anderson. CRITICAL: The task description specifies identifier BAH000015, but the actual system identifier for Robert Anderson is BAH000016. Do not penalize the agent for selecting BAH000016. Target Weight: 82 kg. Target Date: Exactly 10 days prior to the current date.
